No Kept By PM Rules Found

Click the "Create New Rule" button to get started.

New Kept By PM Rule

Follow the steps to create a new rule.

1

Details

Rule name & charges.

2

Properties

Apply to properties.

3

Review

Confirm and save.

Rule name is required.

At least one charge must be selected.

Apply to Properties

Select the properties this rule should apply to. If none are selected, the rule will apply to all properties.
